text_block_list.name: Lambs
text_block_list.text: Baaaa...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega's face contorts as the lambs
surround her. As for how we got here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega and I were headed back to the
academy when...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list: What's got you in such a good mood?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Nothing really...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Curren sent me another animal video... and
something in it surprised me.

text_block_list.name: Train Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Next stop, Meadowside Farm Station.
Meadowside Farm Station.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rather than surprised, she seems more cheerful
watching the video on her phone. Visiting a farm
might be a nice idea to brighten her mood.
choice_data_list: Do you want to go and check out the animals?
Do you want to go and check out the animals?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As it turns out, the farm is holding an event where
you can pet the lambs, which brings us to where
we are now.

text_block_list.name: Lambs
text_block_list.text: Baaa...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: H-hey, wait. Why are they all coming this way?!
choice_data_list: They probably want you to pet them.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ack... Why me?

text_block_list.name: Lambs
text_block_list.text: Baaa... Baaa...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah, yeah... Rub your head on me all you
want, but...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Fine, I'll pet you just a little.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (It's... so warm.)

text_block_list.name: Lambs
text_block_list.text: Baaaaa... Baaa...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? You too?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(This one feels quite different from the last one...
It feels like...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: This little guy is so skinny.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if it's because of a nutrient deficiency?
Or maybe stress? Whatever the reason, their
wool...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tell a farm worker what Admire Vega had said.

text_block_list.name: Farm Worker
text_block_list.text:
You're right. They only just arrived recently, so it
might be stress caused by the move. I bet they
haven't been sleeping well...

text_block_list.name: Farm Worker
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for letting us know! It's really good you
noticed so quickly!
choice_data_list: You did a good job spotting that!
You did a good job spotting that!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It was just a coincidence.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It certainly wasn't a big deal...
choice_data_list: But you helped the lamb out.
But you helped the lamb out.
I wonder if that skill can be applied elsewhere...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It certainly wasn't a big deal...
choice_data_list: But you helped the lamb out.
But you helped the lamb out.
I wonder if that skill can be applied elsewhere...

text_block_list.name: Lambs
text_block_list.text: Baaa...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I guess that's good.

text_block_list.name: Lambs
text_block_list.text: Baaa, baaa...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (That little one won't stop bleating at me.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Are you saying "thank you"?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Heh... Of course not...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: There's no way...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following day in the cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Boof!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sorry! Are you okay?! I must have tripped...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's fine.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (The texture of Hayahide's hair just now...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hayahide... are you getting enough sleep?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! How... Actually, I did have trouble falling
asleep last night.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But does it really show on my face? I appreciate
the heads up.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's not your face, it's...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ahem... Never mind. Just take care of yourself.
